images.caption: Figure 1:Example responses with and without a support skill. Without a suitable support skill (left), the agent produces a generic response that fails to address the seeker’s underlying fear, resulting in no observable emotional improvement. With a state- and scenario-aware ESC skill (right), the agent selects a more suitable intervention that facilitates increased self-awareness and constructive emotional reflection.
Figure 2:Overview of the ESC-Skills Bank construction (upper) and Multi-Profile Self-Evolutionary Skill Refinement framework (lower).
Figure 3:Ablation study on Qwen3.6-Plus. (a) SAGE conversation outcomes across 100 test profiles. (b) Divergent trends between SAGE emotion score and ESConv METEOR.
